title: ¡Acompáñanos a vivir la inauguración del Mundial como en casa!
text:
Title: ¡Acompáñanos a vivir la inauguración del Mundial como en casa!
Source: 墨西哥驻华大使馆
Published at: 2026-06-03T04:00:00.000Z
Source URL: https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzA5NTMzMDA2NA==&mid=2651743873&idx=1&sn=be1ad3f8b02d04a0eb3ce542df95343f
Expected action: exclude
Rationale: Embassy event in Beijing but explicitly exclusive to the Mexican community in China.
Review/exclusion reasons: not_general_public
This case is retained as a negative product judgment. The original article content is not mirrored in the public repository.
